title: Ketika Timun Bicara
theme: Menjelajahi ironi kehidupan sehari-hari di mana kebaikan kecil seringkali datang dengan motif tersembunyi atau konsekuensi yang tidak terduga.

cover.prompt: A serene morning view of a bustling traditional Asian market. Warm, soft golden light of dawn gently bats colorful stacks of fresh vegetables: green kangkung, vibrant eggplants, and crisp cucumbers, meticulously arranged on a vendor's wooden stall in the foreground. The air shimmers with a gentle humidity, hinting at aromatic spices. In the background, out of focus, a gentle blur of market-goers and other stalls creates a sense of vibrant activity and community, suggesting a lively environment. A subtle, unobtrusive figure of a vendor is positioned slightly off-center, observing the unfolding scene with a calm, patient presence. The composition uses the rule of thirds, with a shallow depth of field to highlight the intricate details of the produce. The overall atmosphere is one of peaceful observation amidst the market's lively start.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A cynical vegetable vendor, Pak Budi, finds a lost wallet, leading to a comedic and tense public misunderstanding at the market as he tries to return it, only for an ironic truth to emerge. His well-intended, yet self-serving, act of kindness backfires, highlighting the absurdities of daily life and human nature.
meta.target_emotion: Amusement through irony and mild tension, followed by a sense of humorous exasperation.
